Plan: 1 to modify.

Summary by type:
  tables: 1 to modify

Tables:
  ~ events
    + events_org_isolation (policy)
    + events (rls)

DDL to be executed:
--------------------------------------------------

ALTER TABLE events ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY events_org_isolation ON events TO PUBLIC USING (org_id = (NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_org_id', true), ''::text))::uuid);
